# PuInlineNotice

## Intent

- inline notice
- local alert
- contextual message

## Prefer When

- Use for local info, success, warning, or error messages inside a page section.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for page-level announcement strips; use PuAnnouncementBar if it matches.

## Import

```ts
import { PuInlineNotice } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```
